---
title: Lists, ordered and unordered, nested
---

An unordered list:

- First item.
- Second item with **inline formatting**.
- Third item.

An ordered list:

1. Step one.
2. Step two with a [link](/somewhere).
3. Step three.

A nested list:

- Parent item.
  - Child item.
    - Grandchild item.
  - Another child.
- Sibling parent.

A task list (GFM):

- [ ] Pending task.
- [x] Completed task.
- [ ] Another pending one.
